title: FE-17 - Implementation Map For Current Codebase
description: Map truc tiep FE-17 vao codebase hien tai, trong do FE-15 single review va FE-16 feedback da ton tai o `ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration`. Muc tieu la them hoac hoan thien bulk approve/reject semantics tren durable `LlmSuggestion` rows ma khong tao schema moi.

techStack.architecture: Modular Monolith (CQRS via Dispatcher, IRepository<T, Guid>, schema isolation, optimistic concurrency by RowVersion)

missingOrNeedsVerificationForFe17: Confirm the shared review service is fully reused by both FE-15 single review and FE-17 bulk review.
Confirm controller route, request model, result model, and logging align with the preferred FE-17 contract.
Confirm no accidental EF or Docker drift was introduced while adding FE-17.

moduleStructure.description: Khong tao module moi. FE-17 tiep tuc nam trong `ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration` vi no la mo rong cua `LlmSuggestion` review lifecycle.

addedFilesIfMissing.description: CQRS write path for batch approve/reject with filters.
Request body for the bulk-review endpoint.
Summary result returned by FE-17 bulk review.
Shared review service contract reused by FE-15 and FE-17.
Shared implementation for single and batch review/materialization.
Targeted unit tests for filter semantics and batch behavior.

modifiedFiles.change: Add or reconcile `POST bulk-review` endpoint on the existing suggestion controller.
Reuse the shared review service so single review and bulk review stay aligned.
Register the shared review service if not already registered.

expectedUnchangedFiles: ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant/ - no durable FE-17 state expected
ClassifiedAds.Migrator/ - no new FE-17 migration expected in the preferred design
ClassifiedAds.WebAPI/Dockerfile - no new project reference expected
ClassifiedAds.Background/Dockerfile - no new project reference expected
docker-compose.yml - no new runtime dependency expected

selectionRules: Select only `Pending` suggestions for the suite.
approveRules: Use `ApproveManyAsync` on the shared review service.
Create one `TestSuiteVersion` row for the batch.
rejectRules: Use `RejectManyAsync` on the shared review service.
Do not create `TestCase` rows or `TestSuiteVersion` rows.

mandatory: Do not dispatch per-suggestion single-review commands in a loop from the bulk command handler.
Keep batch selection and ordering inside the bulk command handler or a dedicated helper if needed.
Keep service responsibilities clear: controller binds and dispatches, command handler selects, shared review service writes.
forbidden: Creating a new bulk-review table or aggregate root just for FE-17.
Changing FE-16 feedback persistence/query semantics unless a real bug is found.
Adding EF migrations for FE-17 unless the implementation unexpectedly changes the model.

implementationSequence: 1. Reuse or harden shared review service
2. Add or reconcile bulk command + controller + request/result models
3. Add tests and verify no accidental migration or Docker drift
